text: First, I feel a sense of precaution as I notice the fire safety equipment—fire can be both destruction and renewal. Then, moving into the vivid R+D space, curiosity stirs within me. Here, amidst innovation and inquiry, I am reminded of the eternal interplay between creation and the unknown. The colors and words on the wall seem to challenge my mind, kindling a quiet excitement for knowledge and discovery. I feel alert, engaged, and philosophical, pondering the human drive to investigate, prevent, and ultimately understand.
